name: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AX DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - 2x DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AX DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support, WiFi 6E, and PCIe 4.0 connectivity.
